# Acme Project

## What
A production system implementing [Gadget Pattern](../Concepts/Gadget Pattern.md) principles derived from [Widget Theory](../Concepts/Widget Theory.md).

## Status
Currently in development. [Alice Smith](../People/Alice Smith.md) leads the implementation.
